Reason_for_Visit.summary: Malignant neoplasm of upper-outer quadrant of left breast in female, estrogen receptor negative, stage IIB

Cancer_Diagnosis.Type_of_Cancer: Malignant neoplasm of upper-outer quadrant of left breast in female, estrogen receptor negative (CMS code)
Cancer_Diagnosis.Stage_of_Cancer: Stage IIB (Clinical: Stage IIB (T2, N0, M0, G1, ER-, PR+, HER2-)

Clinical_Findings.findings: Large 8 x 5 cm mobile breast mass in the left breast, palpable; no skin changes or lymphadenopathy bilaterally; thyroid stimulating hormone (TSH) 1.55 mIU/L; hemoglobin A1c 5.0%

Current_Medications.current_meds: ascorbic acid, vitamin C, gabapentin, LORazepam, naloxone, vitamin B complex, HYDROcodone-acetaminophen, ibuprofen, traMADoL

Treatment_Changes.recent_changes: She declined further IV or preoperative therapy.

Treatment_Goals.current_meds: hydrocodone, ibuprofen, tramadol, lorazepam, ascorbic acid, gabapentin, naloxone, vitamin B complex

Response_Assessment.response_assessment: No evidence of response to treatment, tumor is enlarging
Response_Assessment.current_meds: ascorbic acid, gabapentin, LORazepam, naloxone, vitamin B complex, HYDROcodone-acetaminophen, ibuprofen, traMADoL

hormonal therapy.summary: Olaparib for a year as part of adjuvant therapy

radiotherapy.summary: Role of radiation to decrease the risk of local recurrence discussed

bowel regimen.summary: Anti-inflammatory and/or diabetes risk reducing diet

other treatment.summary: Lifestyle modifications, including limiting alcohol, exercise, stress reduction and sleep management

Medication_Plan.medication_plan: Olaparib for a year as part of adjuvant therapy, Xeloda, and possibly additional medication to be considered
Medication_Plan.current_meds: Not yet on treatment — no response to assess.

Therapy_plan.therapy_plan: She will start olaparib for a year as part of adjuvant therapy. She will qualify for adjuvant xeloda. She will undergo bilateral mastectomy with left lumpectomy on January 31.
Therapy_plan.current_meds: Not yet on treatment — no meds listed

radiotherapy_plan.radiotherapy_plan: We discussed the role of surgery and radiation to decrease the risk of local recurrence.

Procedure_Plan.procedure_plan: mastectomy with left mastectomy will be performed on January 31

Lab_Plan.current_meds: Not yet on treatment — no response to assess.

Referral.Nutrition: anti-inflammatory and/or diabetes risk reducing diet

follow_up_next_visit.Next clinic visit: I will see her after she recovers from surgery
